releases.title: Race, cards, and mobile brackets
releases.titleZh: 竞争、球员卡与移动端对阵
highlights: Browser Back and Forward now move through app states like Standings, selected match cards, and country search instead of leaving the app.
Mobile Tournament now opens as a compact swipeable bracket board with connector lines and round-to-round shifts instead of a one-column list.
Knockout calendar slots now auto-fill countries once group or source-match results make the participant certain.
Locked Tournament bracket cards now keep confirmed countries in full color, remove duplicate round labels, and leave unresolved Round of 32 slots muted as projections.
Locked bracket cards now open the matching date, row, and info card, and knockout round labels in match details link back to the Tournament bracket.
Knockout match details now replace the placeholder context with group-round form, prior-round source matches, and the next winner path.
Unconfirmed Round of 32 opponents now stay as slot labels in match-detail group summaries until their place is locked.
Unconfirmed matchup key-information cards now explain that the copy will be populated once the matchup is confirmed.
Knockout info cards now show country flags beside team names in group-form, source-match, and next-path summaries.
Confirmed knockout fixtures now automatically receive ranking projections, key-player watchlists, H2H research-pending states, and matchup-aware key information.
South Africa vs Canada match details now show the verified 2007 senior H2H result instead of the research-pending placeholder.
Projected Round of 16 and later countries now stay muted until their source match winner is confirmed.
Completed groups now reuse the archived green advancement row highlight for confirmed Round of 32 teams.
Third-place race badges now say whether a path is still open, how many matches are left, and the best-case points ceiling.
Home match rows now hide ranking pills, add a little more mobile spacing around flags and vs, and move compact world-ranking pills into the selected match card title.
Player hover cards now show the player country's flag beside the name, while historical cards keep archive-note wording.
Chinese player-card skill pills now translate generated role labels instead of showing raw English.
highlightsZh: 浏览器后退和前进现在会在积分榜、已选比赛卡和国家队搜索等应用状态之间切换，不会直接离开应用。
移动端淘汰赛现在是紧凑的可滑动对阵板，保留连接线和轮次切换动效，不再显示为单列列表。
当小组或上轮淘汰赛结果已经确定参赛队时，淘汰赛日历席位现在会自动填入国家队。
已锁定的淘汰赛对阵卡现在会让确认球队保持全彩显示，并移除重复轮次标签；尚未确定的32强席位仍以灰色预测样式呈现。
已锁定的对阵卡现在会打开对应日期、比赛行和信息卡，比赛详情里的淘汰赛轮次标签也可跳回淘汰赛对阵。
淘汰赛比赛详情现在会用小组赛表现、上一轮来源比赛和下一轮胜者路径替代占位说明。
尚未确认的32强对手现在会在比赛详情的小组摘要中保留为席位名称，直到席位锁定后才显示国家队。
尚未确认对阵的关键信息卡现在会说明，对阵确认后再补充文案。
淘汰赛信息卡现在会在小组表现、来源比赛和下一轮路径摘要中的队名旁显示国旗。
确认球队的淘汰赛现在会自动补入排名预测、重点球员观察名单、交锋待研究状态和对阵关键信息。
南非对加拿大的比赛详情现在显示已核验的 2007 年成年队交锋结果，不再显示待研究占位说明。
16强及后续轮次的预测球队现在会保持灰色显示，直到来源比赛胜者确认。
已完赛小组现在会沿用存档赛事的绿色晋级行高亮来标记确认进入32强的球队。
最佳第三名竞争标签现在会说明是否仍有出线路径、还剩几场比赛，以及最好情况的积分上限。
首页比赛行现在隐藏排名标签，在移动端为国旗和“vs/对”留出一点呼吸空间；选中的比赛卡标题会显示更紧凑的世界排名标签。
球员悬停卡现在会在姓名旁显示球员国家旗帜，历史球员卡也保留档案说明的表述。
中文球员卡的技能标签现在会翻译生成的角色文案，不再显示原始英文。

releases.title: Curated player-card rollout
highlights: All 48 current tournament teams now have 26 audited profile overrides each before curated cards appear in the app.
Player-card matching now respects aliases, team-specific names, and historical tournament/team versions to avoid showing the wrong profile.
Projected later-round bracket paths and the third-place race now explain provisional status, top-eight cutoffs, and tiebreakers in English and Chinese.
highlightsZh: 当前赛事的 48 支球队现在各有 26 张通过审核的资料覆盖，只有通过国家工作流后才会在应用中显示精选球员卡。
球员卡匹配现在会识别别名、球队限定姓名，以及历史赛事/球队版本，避免显示错误资料。
后续轮次预测路径和最佳第三名竞争现在会用中英文说明临时状态、前八晋级线和同分规则。

releases.title: Official live-score corrections
highlights: Live scores now apply FIFA official score/status corrections after the general provider sync.
Provider-only score drift can now be corrected before scorer timelines and standings are recomputed.

Live group standings now reflect in-progress scores with FIFA head-to-head tiebreakers, flag third-place candidates in active matches, explain race rank on hover, and mathematically mark eliminated teams as soon as every group-stage path is closed.
Live standings badges now stay grouped on narrow screens, and Past 24 hours fades with other non-live rows while live matches are in focus.
The live-data API now reports how many FIFA official score corrections ran.
highlightsZh: 实时比分现在会在通用数据源同步后应用 FIFA 官方比分和状态校正。
单一数据源的比分偏差现在会在进球时间线和积分榜重新计算前被校正。
小组实时积分榜现在会按 FIFA 交锋优先的规则反映进行中的比分，标记正在比赛的第三名候选球队，可悬停查看排名原因，并在所有小组出线路径被数学封死时立即标记已淘汰球队。
实时积分榜徽章现在会在窄屏上保持成组显示，且实时比赛聚焦时，“过去 24 小时”会与其他非实时行一起淡化。
实时数据 API 现在会报告本次运行了多少项 FIFA 官方比分校正。

releases.title: Loading polish
highlights: Release notes now use the same rounded skeleton loading style as the rest of the app.
Third-place standings now show table-shaped loading rows instead of an empty body.
The tournament bracket now shows bracket-shaped loading cards while standings data loads.
highlightsZh: 发布说明现在使用与应用其他区域一致的圆角骨架加载样式。
最佳第三名积分榜现在会显示表格形骨架行，而不是空白表体。
淘汰赛对阵在积分数据加载时会显示对阵形骨架卡片。

releases.title: Live scorer reliability
highlights: Live and final scorer matching now falls back from FIFA match IDs to match numbers, country IDs, and normalized team names.
FIFA timeline lookups now include the full UTC date window for late local kickoffs.
Colombia vs DR Congo now resolves Daniel Muñoz's 76th-minute winner from FIFA's official timeline.
highlightsZh: 实时和完场进球者匹配现在会从 FIFA 比赛 ID 依次回退到比赛编号、国家 ID 和标准化队名。
FIFA 时间线查询现在会覆盖本地晚场开球所需的完整 UTC 日期窗口。
哥伦比亚对阵刚果民主共和国现在会从 FIFA 官方时间线解析 Daniel Muñoz 第 76 分钟的制胜球。

releases.title: Historical player metadata
highlights: Historical player cards now show archive-age context and peak values when available.
Historical photos now use current-player, Transfermarkt, and curated Wikipedia/Wikimedia sources.
Footer source and release notes now stay in compact in-page tooltips.
highlightsZh: 历史球员卡现在会在可用时显示当届年龄背景和峰值身价。
历史照片现在使用现役球员、Transfermarkt，以及精选的 Wikipedia/Wikimedia 来源。
页脚来源和发布说明现在保留在紧凑的页面内提示框中。
